name: eval/data/mass_adk.test.json
description: Initial MASS-ADK demo prompts for cached experiment inspection.

parts.text: List the completed MASS experiments available in this demo and identify which are multi-seed versus single-seed.
The agent should list cached China and SP500 experiments, distinguish three-seed rows from single-seed rows, and state that Rank IC is a signal-quality metric rather than portfolio return.
